name: Neopolitan Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chicken, onion, potatoes, green pepper, parsley, garlic, salt, pepper, and basil in a Crockpot.
2. Add the spaghetti sauce to the pot.
3. Cook on Low for 6-8 hours or on High for 3-4 hours.
4. Skim any fat that rises to the top of the liquid.
5. Serve the chicken and vegetables in bowls. Optionally, you can omit the potatoes and serve the mixture over spaghetti.
